meta.title: Grievance Redressal
meta.description: How to raise complaints and get support with NavDhan.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

intro.heading: Grievance Redressal
intro.body: We take every concern seriously. If you are unhappy with our service, a lender, or a partner, please follow the process below.

sections.title: বাংলা
sections.body: বাংলা অনুবাদ শীঘ্রই আসছে। এই ফাইলটি বাংলা স্থানীয়করণের জন্য একটি প্লেসহোল্ডার।

items.heading: Email us
items.body: Send your complaint to support@navdhan.app with the subject line "Complaint".

items.heading: Write to us
items.body: Mail your complaint to our registered address.

items.heading: Reference number
items.body: Include your application or registered mobile number so we can locate your record.

items.heading: Your details
items.body: Full name, registered email, and phone number.

items.heading: Issue description
items.body: A clear description of what happened and when.

items.heading: Expected resolution
items.body: What you would like us to do to resolve the matter.

items.heading: Supporting documents
items.body: Screenshots, emails, or any other relevant evidence.

items.heading: Acknowledgement
items.body: Within 3 working days of receiving your complaint.

items.heading: Initial response
items.body: Within 7 working days with an update or resolution.

items.heading: Final resolution
items.body: Within 30 days for most complaints. Complex cases may take longer with a reasoned explanation.

sections.title: Escalation to Nodal Officer
sections.body: If you are not satisfied with the resolution, you may escalate to our Nodal Grievance Officer. Please include your original complaint and our response.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

sections.title: RBI complaint
sections.body: If your complaint relates to a lender and remains unresolved, you may approach the Reserve Bank of India Integrated Ombudsman Scheme or the lender's grievance mechanism, as applicable.

sections.title: Record keeping
sections.body: We maintain records of all complaints and resolutions to monitor quality and comply with regulatory requirements.

localeNote: বাংলা অনুবাদ শীঘ্রই আসছে। এই ফাইলটি বাংলা স্থানীয়করণের জন্য একটি প্লেসহোল্ডার।
